items.name: Dark Green Neon Cartoony Top Hat
items.description:
This Top Hat features a dark green color with a smooth surface and a thin white band wrapped neatly around the base of the Hat, adding a sleek and elegant contrast to the vibrant green.

Pro Tip: Is the Item too small? Too big? Bad Positioned?
Use Robloxs Accessory Adjustment mode!

items.name: ERSIN Official Cat Backpack
items.description:
ERSIN Cat Backpack 

Carry a piece of digital stardom wherever you go with the official exclusive ERSIN Cat Backpack! Created by Enrapture.world in partnership with ERSIN, the influencer and digital creator with over 1 million followers across multiple virtual worlds, this stylish backpack is not just a cute companion for animal lovers but a statement of creativity and adventure. Whether you're exploring magical realms or dominating the minigames, the ERSIN Cat Backpack is your perfect travel buddy—complete with sleek designs and feline flair. Show off your style and rep the universe of ERSIN with this one-of-a-kind accessory!
